description: The ButtonRelay component sends a signal (and optionally with a Value Type) to a button event handler (usually something internal like a Sync Delegate).

fields.DoublePressDelay: how long it takes before it is to late to count as a double press.
fields.ReleasePressInterval: The amount of time it takes to release the button.
fields.ButtonPressed: The place to send the signal.

usage: This can send a signal internally.
